discussion_comments.comment_body:
```suggestion
  ruff check
```
Looks like we don't need to specify the current directory anymore, since ruff will run in the current directory by default: https://docs.astral.sh/ruff/tutorial/#getting-started

Instructions on how to install mypy can be found [here](https://github.com/python/mypy). Please use the command `mypy --ignore-missing-imports .` to test all files or `mypy --ignore-missing-imports path/to/file.py` to test a specific file.
 
-- [__List comprehensions and generators__](https://docs.python.org/3/tutorial/datastructures.html#list-comprehensions) are preferred over the use of `lambda`, `map`, `filter`, `reduce` but the important thing is to demonstrate the power of Python in code that is easy to read and maintain.
